lessons.text: Know the divine as unborn and beginningless, and be freed from delusion.
lessons.rationale: Verses 1-3 frame the chapter: knowing the source as unborn Lord liberates mortals from delusion and sin.

lessons.text: Absorb your mind in the divine and awaken others by sharing it.
lessons.rationale: The wise, rooted in the source of all, worship with delight and enlighten one another — the devotional response to divine origin.

lessons.text: Worship steadfastly with love, and clear discernment will be given.
lessons.rationale: Loving, steadfast devotion earns the yoga of discrimination that leads to the divine.

lessons.text: Let the lamp of knowledge burn away the darkness of ignorance.
lessons.rationale: The divine dwelling within destroys ignorance with the luminous lamp of knowledge.

lessons.text: See every glory and power as a spark of the divine splendor.
lessons.rationale: Whatever is glorious, prosperous, or powerful is a fragment of divine splendor.

lessons.text: Trust that a single fragment of the divine upholds the whole world.
lessons.rationale: The closing teaching: the divine supports this entire universe with just one part of itself.
